body: This PR removes the `CESExt` extension, `env_*` functions, and `EnsembleKalmanProcess`  constructors. All of the functionality removed seems to be unused or not recommended. For example, you should just use the `EnsembleKalmanProcess` constructor provided by EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl instead of using the one provided by ClimaCalibrate.jl.
title: Remove unused functionality
